title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 23 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today, The main contract I2401 plummeted significantly in theafternoon and ultimately closed at 976.5, a decrease of 0.86% throughout the day. some traders were negative to sell, Some traders are temporarily unable to ship due to losses. The purchasing enthusiasm of steel mills has increased, with low price procurement being the main focus.
